raw_description: Willey bowls a good length delivery outside off, swinging in. Pant defends it solidly off the front foot.
Willey bowls short of a length outside off. Pant attempts a square cut but mistimes it towards point.
Willey pitches it full outside off. Pant drives it cleanly towards cover, but the fielder stops it.
Willey bowls a good length delivery on off stump. Pant defends it solidly off the front foot.
Willey bowls another good length delivery on off stump. Pant defends it again.
Willey bowls on off stump. Pant pushes it towards cover and takes a quick single.
Topley starts with a good length delivery on off stump. Rohit defends it solidly.
Topley bowls on the leg stump. Pant attempts a flick but gets an inside edge, caught by the keeper.
